title: APM: Clickjacking - Missing Frame Protection Headers
description: Detects HTTP responses to HTML pages missing X-Frame-Options or Content-Security-Policy frame-ancestors headers, indicating clickjacking vulnerability in monitored applications.
query: 'Log Source' in ('enterprise-crm-portal', 'octo-drone-shop', 'SOC Application Logs') and 'HTTP Status Code' = 200 and not ('Response Headers' like '%X-Frame-Options%' or 'Response Headers' like '%frame-ancestors%') | stats count as MissingHeaders by 'HTTP URL', 'service.name' | sort -MissingHeaders
falsepositives: Public pages intentionally designed to be embeddable
